# Watering Schedules for Tomato Beds

Raised beds drain faster than open ground, so tomatoes need a steady rhythm
rather than occasional soaking.

## Observations

- [requirement] Water deeply once per week during the growing season #watering
- [gotcha] Shallow daily watering trains roots to stay near the surface #watering

- relates_to [[Composting Basics]]
